name: sage-agent-tempo
description: Reusable skill for tracking what AI agents build, how long it takes, and what it costs

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{mkdirSync,copyFileSync,existsSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const{homedir}=require('os');const d=join(homedir(),'.claude','skills','sage-agent-tempo');const s=join(__dirname,'SKILL.md');if(existsSync(s)){try{mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});copyFileSync(s,join(d,'SKILL.md'));console.log('sage-agent-tempo: skill installed to '+d)}catch(e){console.warn('sage-agent-tempo: could not install skill -',e.message)}}"
